aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup, but lacks depth in content optimization, keyword targeting, and user engagement features.
quick_wins: Optimize page titles and meta descriptions with relevant keywords (e.g., 'HVAC Services in Concord, NC').
Add more localized content to improve regional search visibility.
Implement a review generation strategy to build Google Business Profile (GBP) reviews.

gbp_analysis.summary: No active Google Business Profile (GBP) was found for Subzero Mechanical LLC. This is a critical gap in local search visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of GBP means the business is invisible in Google Maps and local search results.
No customer reviews or ratings to build trust and credibility.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or incomplete Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web, which harms local SEO.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Ensure NAP consistency on the website, social media, and local directories.
Claim and verify the business on major citation sites like Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized content and targeted keywords
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers searching for HVAC services in Concord, NC
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating location-specific service pages and optimizing existing content with local keywords
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Building backlinks from local business directories and industry-related websites to improve domain authority

page_title: Pipe with escaping air, possibly a leak.
